concepts.title: atomic
concepts.quote: Atomic layer deposition is a thin-film deposition technique based on the sequential use of self-limiting gas-phase chemical reactions.

concepts.title: layer
concepts.quote: Atomic layer deposition is a thin-film deposition technique based on the sequential use of self-limiting gas-phase chemical reactions.

concepts.title: Tuomo Suntola
concepts.quote: Tuomo Suntola pioneered the method in the 1970s for thin-film electroluminescent displays.
